problem id: 6b75f5f0
category: bit_manipulation

rule: ROT(2)

examples:
  01111011 -> 11101101
  10110111 -> 11011110
  11010010 -> 01001011
  01110101 -> 11010101
  00001111 -> 00111100
  11000001 -> 00000111
  00100100 -> 10010000
  10110010 -> 11001010
  10010010 -> 01001010

query: 00101111
predicted answer: 10111100
